# flixen.se

> Personal site and portfolio of Felix Svensson (klowdo) — a terminal-themed,
> tmux-inspired single-page app built with SvelteKit, statically rendered and
> hosted on GitHub Pages. JetBrains Mono, Catppuccin colors, keyboard-driven.

## About the developer

Felix Svensson is a senior software developer who can handle almost anything you
throw at him and learns new tools and domains fast. Comfortable across the stack:
TypeScript, Svelte/SvelteKit, Go, infrastructure-as-code (Nix, Tailscale, GitOps),
and developer tooling. Picks up unfamiliar languages, frameworks, and systems
quickly and ships clean, intentional code.

## Site

- [Home](https://flixen.se/): Interactive terminal/tmux-style portfolio
- [Sitemap](https://flixen.se/sitemap.xml): All indexed pages

## Contact

- Email: felix@flixen.se, klowdo.fs@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/klowdo
